meta.title: BD Property Hub — Property for Bangladesh, worldwide
meta.description: Buy, rent, and co-own verified property across Bangladesh. Built for expatriates and local buyers, with every deal brokered by our team.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your listings and saved properties.
auth.registerSubtitle: Buy, rent, or co-own verified property across Bangladesh — from anywhere.
auth.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errorEmailExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.errorNetwork: Can't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.errorUnexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.errorBody: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Here's your account at a glance. Listings and saved properties are coming next.

listings.becomeSellerTitle: Start selling on BD Property Hub
listings.becomeSellerBody: Switch on seller access to create and manage property listings.
listings.becomeSellerError: Couldn't enable seller access. Please try again.
listings.createDescription: Start with the basics — you can add photos, pricing, and details before submitting for review.
listings.createError: Couldn't create the draft. Please try again.
listings.submitError: Couldn't submit the listing. Please try again.
listings.empty: No listings yet. Create your first draft above.

photos.title: Photos
photos.tooLarge: Each image must be 10 MB or smaller.
photos.wrongType: Please choose a JPG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC image.
photos.uploadError: Couldn't upload the photo. Please try again.

moderation.queueDescription: Approve or reject listings submitted by sellers.
moderation.empty: Nothing waiting for review right now.
moderation.reasonRequired: Please enter a reason to reject.
moderation.approveError: Couldn't approve the listing. Please try again.
moderation.rejectError: Couldn't reject the listing. Please try again.

home.headline: Find property in Bangladesh
home.subhead: Land, apartments, and commercial space — every listing verified and every deal brokered by our team, in English and Bangla.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search by area, city, or district
